name: road-trip-weather
description: Road trip weather forecasts timed to your arrival, as an installable Android app.

scripts.android:add: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.ios:add: npm run build && npx cap add ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:run: npm run ios:sync && npx cap run ios
